task_completion.description: Verify the solicitation number 'CIRA-2025-MSOC-0047' is included in the document header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top margin (header section) of the Word document displays the text 'CIRA-2025-MSOC-0047'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 1' style is applied to at least four top-level section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four distinct headers are visibly formatted with the 'Heading 1' style (typically larger, bold text) or are visible as top-level nodes in the Word Navigation Pane.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 2' style is applied to at least six sub-section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least six distinct sub-headers are visibly formatted with the 'Heading 2' style or are visible as nested nodes under Heading 1 in the Word Navigation Pane.

task_completion.description: Verify a compliance matrix table exists with at least 10 data rows mapping FAR clauses from Section B (including FAR 52.212-series) to compliance responses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is present in the document containing at least 10 rows (excluding the header row). The columns must reference FAR clauses (specifically showing '52.212' series) and contain corresponding compliance response text.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved as 'mssoc_proposal_response.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word title bar shows 'mssoc_proposal_response.docx' (or without extension), and a Save As dialog or File Explorer window confirms the file is located in the Desktop\WordTasks directory.

integrity.description: The agent used Microsoft Word's GUI to format the document and create the table.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Microsoft Word application interface being actively used (e.g., ribbon tabs, styles pane, table tools) rather than terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The compliance matrix is an actual Word table, not just text formatted with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Table gridlines, cell borders, or the 'Table Design'/'Layout' ribbon tabs are visible when the matrix is interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the provided raw document rather than pasting a pre-generated completed document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the agent applying styles and inserting the table into the existing text step-by-step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves preparing a proposal response for a fictional Federal solicitation (CIRA-2025-MSOC-0047). The occupation 'Management Analyst' (O*NET SOC 13-1111.00) and industry 'Professional Scientific and Technical Services' (NAICS Sector 54) are verified. Booz Allen Hamilton is a real consulting firm. However, the data is synthetic: CIRA is a fictional agency, and the solicitation number does not exist in real government databases.
